negative_evidence: turboSETI completed on held-out HIP39826 HDF5 without valid hits at SNR >= 10
radio input validation would refuse candidate scoring because the hit table has zero valid rows

method_reviews.reason: No valid hit rows were present for candidate feature extraction.
No candidate feature vector can be produced from a zero-hit held-out table.
The second populated target still has no valid hit frequencies to compare across targets.
No hit morphology rows exist for density clustering.
No hit feature rows exist for scoring; scorer summary also reports no fitted training corpus.

open_blockers_after_run: Need at least one held-out DECISION-133 evidence stream with valid hit rows or an injection-recovery stream before independent candidate-level method comparison can close.
Need a production evidence bundle containing method outputs, disagreements, abstentions, and negative evidence from the same held-out evidence.
A third extended-corpus target or the setigen injection grid needs explicit operator approval before expansion beyond the second bounded attempt.
conclusion: This second bounded run strengthens DECISION-134 negative evidence by showing HIP39826 also produces zero valid turboSETI hit rows at the configured threshold. It does not close DECISION-134 because independent candidate-level method comparison still lacks valid held-out hit rows.
